spec.objective: Extend the v1alpha1 API types with a per-level Vendor field. Add Vendor string (with +kubebuilder:validation:Enum=anthropic;openai CEL marker) to both LevelConfig and SubagentConfig in api/v1alpha1/project_types.go, then run make manifests generate to regenerate zz_generated.deepcopy.go and the CRD YAML under config/crd/bases/. No controller, chart, or cmd/ changes -- this plan establishes the schema foundation consumed by plan-02.
